data.body:
When  new beats are submitted, they should save immediately but also add "Scope Refinement" job to a queue that is picked up by a ScopeRefinement worker.  The worker asks an agent to:

- Tighten up the title
- Tighten up the description for clarity 
- Define or tighten clear acceptance criteria based on the scope of the beat.

The ScopeRefinement worker should have a prompt that is configurable within Settings, in a place htat makes sense.

Scope Refinement should also be treated as a poolable dispatch state (even though it is not a "state")
data.title: Create New:  Spawn asynchronous  Scope Refinement job when ticket is created.
